PLAINTIFF JASMINE WILLIAMS' MOTION TO COMPEL. (FOR TENTATIVE RULING ONLY PART 2 OF 2)

Off Calendar Aug-18-2023 Off Calendar

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Aug-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Michael Bracamontes, Esq. 415-835-6777 Bracamontes & Vlasak, P.C. for Plaintiff.
Mossamat Karim, Esq. 415-394-9400 Jackson Lewis for Defendant Community Housing Partnership dba Homerise.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF JASMINE WILLIAMS' Motion To Compel.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Sanctions are taken under submission.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
